CustomField.formula: UPPER(Parent_User_Setting__r.Country__r.Country_Code__c)+ '_' + ('E' + IF(Unique_Index__c<10000, '0', '') + IF(Unique_Index__c<1000, '0', '') + IF(Unique_Index__c<100, '0', '') + IF(Unique_Index__c<10, '0', '') + TEXT(Unique_Index__c))+'_'+ Name+ '_'+(IF(DAY( Start_Event_Date__c )<10, '0', '')) + TEXT(DAY(Start_Event_Date__c))+ '_'+ (IF(MONTH(Start_Event_Date__c)<10, '0', '') + TEXT(MONTH(Start_Event_Date__c) )+ '_'+TEXT(YEAR(Start_Event_Date__c)))
CustomField.label: Event Name
